privileged_info_summary: The task uses completely synthetic data created in setup_task.sh: 10 course records with 6 selected courses totaling 20 credits (CS101 3cr, MATH201 4cr, PHYS101 4cr, ENGL102 3cr, HIST150 3cr, CS201 3cr). Two known time conflicts exist: CS101 vs MATH201 (both MWF, overlap 9:30-9:50 AM) and PHYS101 vs HIST150 (both TTh, HIST150 entirely overlaps within PHYS101's 10:00-11:50 slot). With 20 total credits, the expected enrollment status is OVERLOAD (threshold >18 credits). Success requires meeting 70% of 8 criteria: conflict column, detection formulas, identifying both known conflicts, conditional formatting, credit SUM formula, correct total (20 credits), correct status (OVERLOAD), and no false positives (e.g., CS101 should not flag PHYS101 due to different days). The task has 180-second timeout, 15-step limit, medium difficulty, and sparse reward.
